recommendedHarnessFlags.reason: False selects embedded decoded EntityTableData self-population; true selects .bigd IO files.

dbModels.recommendation: Use GameInit.ServerLoadTable=false and GameTools.ClientIsSupportIOLoad()=false. That keeps GetList/GetEntity on InitRequire(), which loads embedded EntityTableData. Returning true switches to .bigd IO files; ServerLoadTable=true expects a JSON cache via GameInit.ReadJsonData.

Use GameInit.ServerLoadTable=false and GameTools.ClientIsSupportIOLoad()=false. That keeps GetList/GetEntity on InitRequire(), which loads embedded EntityTableData. Returning true switches to .bigd IO files; ServerLoadTable=true expects a JSON cache via GameInit.ReadJsonData.
